descriptions.it: The Opportunity Business Unit Service is at the forefront of delivering advanced digital and outcome ‑ based service solutions worldwide. Our Service R&D organization develops next ‑ generation digital, data ‑ driven, and OT ‑ integrated service solutions that enable long ‑ term asset performance, reliability, and operational excellence across the energy and industrial domain. As Lead Data Platform Architect, you will play a key role in defining and evolving the data platform foundation that underpins BU Service digital service solutions. You will ensure that data platforms spanning cloud services, IoT and OT data sources, analytics, and AI enablement are architected, governed, and operated to support scalable, secure, and high ‑ quality digital solutions. This role directly impacts the success of data ‑ driven services, advanced analytics, and AI ‑ powered use cases, where data quality, availability, and reliability are critical for business value and customer trust. How You'll Make an Impact Defining and owning the data platform strategy and architecture for digital service solutions, covering cloud ‑ native data platforms, data lakes\/ lakehouses , streaming and batch pipelines, and analytics services. Establishing architectural principles and standards aligned with modern cloud delivery models, industrial scalability, and long ‑ lifecycle service solutions. Governing data ingestion and integration patterns from cloud services, enterprise systems, IoT, OT devices, and edge software. Designing and maintaining data models, schemas, and integration patterns that ensure consistent, reusable, and high ‑ quality data across solutions. Establishing and operating data governance frameworks, including data quality, lineage, traceability, ownership, and lifecycle management. Ensuring compliance with cybersecurity, regulatory, and industrial data handling requirements. Enabling advanced analytics, AI\/ML, and digital twin use cases through appropriate data platform capabilities, pipelines, and analytics services. Guiding implementation of robust, scalable data pipelines and storage solutions in collaboration with development, platform, DevOps, AI, cybersecurity, and IT teams. Integrating data platform components into CI\/CD pipelines, supporting automated testing, deployment, and governance controls. Defining and monitoring key metrics related to data quality, platform reliability, usage, and business impact. Your Background University degree (Bachelor's or Master's) in Data Science, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field. Proven experience in designing, implementing, or governing cloud ‑ based data platforms in complex digital or industrial environments. Strong understanding of data modeling, data pipelines, and data lifecycle management. Experience with data ingestion from IoT, OT, and enterprise systems. Solid knowledge of data governance, data quality management, and traceability concepts. Experience working in agile, hybrid, or scaled development environments. Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across global, cross ‑ functional teams What's in It for You A strategic leadership role where your work directly shapes the quality and reliability of next ‑ generation digital service solutions The opportunity to operate at enterprise scale, influencing standards, capabilities, and ways of working beyond individual projects A collaborative, technology ‑ driven environment with strong links to innovation, R&D, and service transformation Exposure to complex, real ‑ world digital challenges across cloud, edge, and industrial domains A role designed for experienced professionals who want to combine technical depth with organizational leadership and strategic impact More about us We pride ourselves on offering a holistic range of competitive benefits to support your financial, physical and mental wellbeing and personal development. We want you to truly thrive with us, in work and out. We can provide mo

descriptions.it: Job Description The opportunity We are looking for a passionate and proficient industrial specialist with expertise in power system analysis\/ management and high-level programming. In an inter-disciplinary environment, you will drive cutting-edge innovation for different complex systems in power grid applications. Join our dynamic and motivated team to contribute to a sustainable energy future for all. How you'll make an impact You create impact: Together with your team design innovative approaches for grid operation and deliver them as robust software modules You investigate: Translate real power‑system problems into rigorous models and final solutions for the customers You take initiative: Collaborate with a global and inter-disciplinary team of researchers and engineers in Hitachi Energy to drive the development from concept to production You connect: Build relationships within the company and actively share your knowledge and expertise. Interact with local and global external partners including universities, start-ups, and vendors to integrate diverse perspectives and stakeholder inputs You communicate: Be able to clearly communicate concepts to software developers, implementation engineering teams and customers. Produce clear design docs and developer-facing examples\/ notebooks that enable reuse. Your background Master Electrical\/Power Systems Engineering, Automation, Computer Science, Mathematics, or Master's degree with equivalent industry experience Proven expertise in modelling and steady-state analyses of power grids demonstrated hands-on expertise applying these methods in software development. Knowledge in mathematical optimization applied to power systems, and modern numerical solvers is strongly desired (e.g., MIP\/NLP, stochastic; tools such as Gurobi, CPLEX, Ipopt). Experience with machine learning and\/or artificial intelligence technologies is a plus Proficiency in C#, C++, Rust or a similar high-level programming language is required; Python and\/or Matlab for analytics and fast prototyping are a plus. Experience building state-of-the-art software engineering techniques (version control, code reviews, testing, CI\/CD) and integrating solution algorithms into applications are beneficial (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes). High performance computing skills such as parallel\/distributed computing, GPU, OpenMP or MPI would be beneficial Excellent communication skills in English, team player attitude, initiative and creativity More about us We pride ourselves on offering a holistic range of competitive benefits to support your financial, physical and mental wellbeing and personal development. We want you to truly thrive with us, in work and out. We can provide more information during the recruitment process. Are you ready for a new exciting challenge? Does the above description sound like you? Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don't delay – apply today! Dbamy o przejrzystość i zgodność z wymogami prawnymi tak, aby każda osoba uczestnicząca w procesie rekrutacyjnym wiedziała, czego może się spodziewać na poszczególnych etapach. Po pomyślnym zakończeniu procesu przedstawimy wybranej osobie szczegóły dotyczące warunków finansowych oraz benefitów. Pozostałe elementy oferty zostaną przekazane przed podpisaniem umowy o pracę, tak by stworzyć możliwość spokojnego zapoznania się z nimi. * Klauzula obowiązuje wyłącznie na terenie Polski , zgodnie z lokalnymi przepisami prawa. We are committed to full transparency and compliance with all legal requirements, ensuring that every candidate knows exactly what to expect at each stage of the recruitment process. Once the process is successfully completed, we will share detailed information about financial conditions and benefits with the selected candidate. Before signing the employment contract, you will receive all remaining details of the offer, giving you the time and space to review everything carefully. *Applicable only for Poland location align with

descriptions.it: The opportunity As part of our ongoing digital transformation journey, we are developing ACE, a cutting-edge Generative AI-powered platform designed to enhance the efficiency and accuracy of our Bid & Proposal Management process within the Transformers Business Unit. We are seeking a Prompt Engineer who will play a pivotal role in this initiative. This individual will be responsible for designing, testing, and optimizing domain-specific prompts that enable ACE to generate accurate, context-aware, and business-aligned outputs. The role requires a deep understanding of transformer industry, industrial equipment standards as well as basic understanding of prompt engineering best practices and GenAI model behavior, ensuring that ACE delivers high-quality responses tailored to complex business scenarios. The ideal candidate will collaborate closely with IT Experts, Subject Matter Experts, Business stakeholders, and Module Owners to break down complex business logic into domain-specific prompts. How you'll make an impact Develop, refine, and maintain prompt libraries for various transformer units\/factories. Implement advanced techniques like prompt chaining, context injection, and few-shot learning for enterprise-grade accuracy. Own prompt lifecycle management including versioning, traceability, and governance. Evaluate LLM responses for precision, compliance, and bias mitigation. Conduct A\/B testing and maintain performance dashboards for prompt effectiveness. Work closely with Module Owners, Subject Matter Experts, and Business Stakeholders to embed prompts into ACE workflows. Create clear documentation for prompt strategies and maintain best practices aligned with Hitachi Energy's AI Ethics Charter. Stay updated on emerging GenAI technologies, frameworks, and tools to enhance ACE capabilities. Implement and recommend best practices for prompting across different ACE modules. Your background Bachelor or master degree in electrical engineering Experience working in the transformer industry, with international standards and customer documentation. Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking. Strong linguistic and logical reasoning for crafting precise prompts. Strong understanding of NLP, context management, and token optimization. Ability to experiment and iterate to optimize outputs. Ability to understand business processes and translate them into ACE-specific prompts. Hands-on experience with LLMs and prompt engineering techniques. Strong interest in AI enterprise-grade solutions. Willingness to learn Python and experience with AI APIs services. Ability to work in Agile environments and manage multiple stakeholders. Excellent communication and collaboration skills. Analytical mindset with attention to detail. Empathy for end users and curiosity for experimentation. Commitment to ethical AI practices and continuous learning. Reduction in prompt failure rate and model hallucination. Improvement in accuracy of outputs by modules. Speed and scalability of prompt deployment across ACE modules within the Transformer Business Unit. Compliance with AI governance and security standards. More about us Be part of a global digital transformation initiative. Work on cutting-edge GenAI solutions. Collaborative culture with opportunities for career growth and innovation. We are committed to full transparency and compliance with all legal requirements, ensuring that every candidate knows exactly what to expect at each stage of the recruitment process. Once the process is successfully completed, we will share detailed information about financial conditions and benefits with the selected candidate. Before signing the employment contract, you will receive all remaining details of the offer, giving you the time and space to review everything carefully. * * Applicable only for Poland location align with local law regulations

We are seeking a Prompt Engineer who will play a pivotal role in this initiative. This individual will be responsible for designing, testing, and optimizing domain-specific prompts that enable ACE to generate accurate, context-aware, and business-aligned outputs. The role requires a deep understanding of transformer industry, industrial equipment standards as well as basic understanding of prompt engineering best practices and GenAI model behavior, ensuring that ACE delivers high-quality responses tailored to complex business scenarios. The ideal candidate will collaborate closely with IT Experts, Subject Matter Experts, Business stakeholders, and Module Owners to break down complex business logic into domain-specific prompts. How you'll make an impact Develop, refine, and maintain prompt libraries for various transformer units\/factories. Implement advanced techniques like prompt chaining, context injection, and few-shot learning for enterprise-grade accuracy. Own prompt lifecycle management including versioning, traceability, and governance. Evaluate LLM responses for precision, compliance, and bias mitigation. Conduct A\/B testing and maintain performance dashboards for prompt effectiveness. Work closely with Module Owners, Subject Matter Experts, and Business Stakeholders to embed prompts into ACE workflows. Create clear documentation for prompt strategies and maintain best practices aligned with Hitachi Energy's AI Ethics Charter. Stay updated on emerging GenAI technologies, frameworks, and tools to enhance ACE capabilities. Implement and recommend best practices for prompting across different ACE modules. Your background Bachelor or master degree in electrical engineering Experience working in the transformer industry, with international standards and customer documentation. Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking. Strong linguistic and logical reasoning for crafting precise prompts. Strong understanding of NLP, context management, and token optimization. Ability to experiment and iterate to optimize outputs. Ability to understand business processes and translate them into ACE-specific prompts. Hands-on experience with LLMs and prompt engineering techniques. Strong interest in AI enterprise-grade solutions. Willingness to learn Python and experience with AI APIs services. Ability to work in Agile environments and manage multiple stakeholders. Excellent communication and collaboration skills. Analytical mindset with attention to detail. Empathy for end users and curiosity for experimentation. Commitment to ethical AI practices and continuous learning. Reduction in prompt failure rate and model hallucination. Improvement in accuracy of outputs by modules. Speed and scalability of prompt deployment across ACE modules within the Transformer Business Unit. Compliance with AI governance and security standards. More about us Be part of a global digital transformation initiative. Work on cutting-edge GenAI solutions. Collaborative culture with opportunities for career growth and innovation. We are committed to full transparency and compliance with all legal requirements, ensuring that every candidate knows exactly what to expect at each stage of the recruitment process. Once the process is successfully completed, we will share detailed information about financial conditions and benefits with the selected candidate. Before signing the employment contract, you will receive all remaining details of the offer, giving you the time and space to review everything carefully. * * Applicable only for Poland location align with local law regulations

descriptions.it: Über die Position In deiner vielseitigen Rolle als Incoming Quality Inspector arbeitest du in einem kleinen Team an unserem Standort in Dietlikon und bist mit diesem zusammen verantwortlich, dass unsere internationalen Kunden weiterhin mit den höchsten Qualitätsstandards und einem reibungslosen Betrieb ihrer Anlagen rechnen können. Du bist ein ausgewiesener Teamplayer und kannst anpacken? Du möchtest uns helfen, unsere ambitionierten Ziele für die Zukunft zu erreichen und zusammen mit uns das Service Logistics Center stetig weiter zu entwickeln? – Dann bewirb dich jetzt! Wir bieten dir eine interessante und abwechslungsreiche Aufgabe in einem herausfordernden Umfeld. Das kannst du bewirken Qualitative und Quantitative Prüfung der Materialeingänge mittels mechanischer, elektrischer und optischer Messmittel sowie der dazugehörigen Dokumente Leiten \/ Unterstützen von Aufgaben bei Qualitätsabweichungen Erfassen und verfolgen von Qualitätsabweichungen in SAP Schnittstellenübergreifende Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Teams wie Einkauf, Technik oder Auftragsabwicklung Stetiges verbessern unserer Qualität durch interne Prozessverbesserungen Umsetzung der 5S-Prinzipien Vorleben der Qualitätskultur als Vorbild Das bringst du mit Abgeschlossene technische Berufsausbildung, z.B. Polymechanik, Industriemechanik, oder vergleichbare Ausbildung Sehr gutes Verständnis von technischen Zeichnungen, Messmittel, Material und Stücklisten Gute Kenntnisse in Microsoft Office sowie idealerweise Erfahrung im Umgang mit SAP Gute Deutschkenntnisse und Englischkenntnisse Hohe Leistungsbereitschaft und Motivation um den Standort im Team weiterzuentwickeln Lösungsorientiert und pragmatisch mit Sinn für Prozesse und übergeordnete Zusammenhänge Spass an Teamarbeit und gemeinsamer Erreichung von hochgesteckten Zielen Einwandfreier Leumund Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

descriptions.it: Über die Position Als Mitarbeiter Endprüfung bei Hitachi Energy bist du ein entscheidendes Bindeglied zwischen Produktion und Auslieferung. Du stellst sicher, dass unsere Produkte vor der Freigabe höchsten Qualitäts-, Sicherheits- und Dokumentationsanforderungen entsprechen. Mit deinem Qualitätsbewusstsein und deinem strukturierten Vorgehen trägst du maßgeblich zur Zuverlässigkeit unserer Produkte und zur Zufriedenheit unserer Kunden bei. Das kannst du bewirken Testen von Generatorleistungsschaltern im Prüffeld (80%): Prüfen der Generator Leistungsschalter gemäss vorgegebenem Prüfplan Bewertung der Messergebnisse Durchführung von Kundenabnahmen in Englischer Sprache Erkennen von mechanischen und elektrischen Fehlern Analyse und Korrektur von Verdrahtungsfehlern im Steuerschrank Übernahme der Verantwortung für das Prüfen der zugeteilten Schalter (zeitlicher Ablauf sowie Qualität der Prüfung) Mitarbeit bei der Verbesserung des Messequipments sowie der Prüfprozesse Montage- und Verdrahtungsarbeiten (20%): Selbstständige Verdrahtung von Baugruppen und Schaltersystemen gemäss Arbeitspapieren wie Kundenauftrag, Elektroschema, Checkliste und Arbeits­plan Montage von PGHV-Produkten entsprechend der in den Qualitätssicherungsverfahren und Arbeitsanweisungen festgehaltenen Vorgaben und Zielsetzungen Lesen und verstehen von technischen Zeichnungen und Stücklisten Das bringst du mit Abgeschlossene elektrotechnische Grundausbildung (Automatiker EFZ, o.ä.) Erfahrung im lesen und verstehen von elektrischen Schemas, Montagezeichnungen und Arbeitsanweisungen Kenntnisse der Prüfung elektrischer Maschinen und von Steuerschränken sind von Vorteil Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse (mündlich, schriftlich) Affinität zu Computern (Messequipment, diverse Softwaretools, Dokumentation erstellen und pflegen) Gutes Verständnis für Arbeitssicherheit, hohes Qualitätsbewusstsein sowie kundenorientiertes Denken und professioneller Umgang mit Kunden Mehr über uns Hitachi Energy steht für innovative Technologien und nachhaltige Energielösungen weltweit. Bei uns erwartet dich ein sicherer Arbeitsplatz in einem zukunftsorientierten Unternehmen, spannende Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, ein kollegiales und wertschätzendes Arbeitsumfeld sowie attraktive Sozialleistungen.

descriptions.it: The opportunity Solid-State Transformers (SSTs) are emerging as critical infrastructure for modern data centers, particularly AI facilities, by providing high efficiency (up to 98.5%), compact, and intelligent power management. Unlike conventional transformers, SSTs utilize power electronics to convert medium-voltage grid power directly to 800V DC, significantly reducing footprint, increasing efficiency, and easing grid interconnection. Join us as a Global Product Specialist – Solid-State Transformers (SSTs) and play a pivotal role in shaping the future of data center supply infrastructure, guiding both Hitachi Energy and clients toward smarter, greener, and more resilient operations. If you combine a solid understanding of relevant technologies with insight into customer value drivers—and can translate customer needs into actionable requirements that keep our solutions both innovative and aligned with client expectations—then this role is an excellent fit for you. How you´ll make an impact Conduct market evaluations, competitor analyses, and identify gaps in product, solutions, and services, while assessing Hitachi Energy's positioning Gather and analyze global standards, market requirements, customer needs, and values to contribute to the product roadmap Support the Global Product Manager in creating business cases for product, solutions, and service development projects Support global and local marketing teams in creating market communication materials, including assistance with new product launches Provide sales support, participate in customer meetings, and attend trade shows as required, ensuring the availability of appropriate training materials for internal and external use Drive technical solutions across Hitachi Energy's global footprint, following an annual cycle of activities to govern Global Product Management Your background Bachelor's degree in engineering, along with 10+ years of related experience preferred Prior experience in Product Management or Product Ownership within data centre domain, and knowledge of Solid-State Transformer (SST) technology Possess a technical mindset to serve as a technical expert, instilling customer confidence in the product and contributing to product design Ability to simplify and present the value proposition of a complex offering Strong expertise in qualitative and quantitative business analysis Proficient in analyzing market potential through product segmentation, go-to-market channels, and developing business cases. Willingness to travel domestically and internationally (20%) More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

Join us as a Global Product Specialist – Solid-State Transformers (SSTs) and play a pivotal role in shaping the future of data center supply infrastructure, guiding both Hitachi Energy and clients toward smarter, greener, and more resilient operations. If you combine a solid understanding of relevant technologies with insight into customer value drivers—and can translate customer needs into actionable requirements that keep our solutions both innovative and aligned with client expectations—then this role is an excellent fit for you. How you´ll make an impact Conduct market evaluations, competitor analyses, and identify gaps in product, solutions, and services, while assessing Hitachi Energy's positioning Gather and analyze global standards, market requirements, customer needs, and values to contribute to the product roadmap Support the Global Product Manager in creating business cases for product, solutions, and service development projects Support global and local marketing teams in creating market communication materials, including assistance with new product launches Provide sales support, participate in customer meetings, and attend trade shows as required, ensuring the availability of appropriate training materials for internal and external use Drive technical solutions across Hitachi Energy's global footprint, following an annual cycle of activities to govern Global Product Management Your background Bachelor's degree in engineering, along with 10+ years of related experience preferred Prior experience in Product Management or Product Ownership within data centre domain, and knowledge of Solid-State Transformer (SST) technology Possess a technical mindset to serve as a technical expert, instilling customer confidence in the product and contributing to product design Ability to simplify and present the value proposition of a complex offering Strong expertise in qualitative and quantitative business analysis Proficient in analyzing market potential through product segmentation, go-to-market channels, and developing business cases. Willingness to travel domestically and internationally (20%) More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptions.it: Die Möglichkeit Hitachi Energy High Voltage Products ist der weltweit anerkannte Spezialist für Energieübertragung und Energieverteilung. Die Serviceeinheit ist für den weltweiten After Sales Support von Generatorenschutzschaltersystemen (GCB) und gasisolierten Schaltanlagen (GIS) inklusive Schulungen, Installation und Inbetriebnahme, planmäßiger Wartung, Zusatzleistungen, Troubleshooting, Erweiterungen, Umbauten und Austausch zuständig. Service ist der Schlüssel zum Erfolg. Als Kollege\/-in in unserem weltweit tätigen Service Team schätzen Sie die selbstständige, abwechslungsreiche und lösungsorientierte Arbeit. Nach einer vielseitigen, praxisorientierten Ausbildung in der Schweiz und im Ausland, werden Sie rund um den Globus GIS Installationen und Wartungen leiten. Es erwartet Sie eine technisch herausfordernde Stelle in einem multikulturellen Umfeld. Das können Sie bewirken Leitung von multikulturellen Baustellen weltweit für gasisolierte Schaltanlagen für das Spannungslevel von 110KV – 550KV Verantwortlich für die erfolgreiche Durchführung der vor Ort Installation, Wartungen und Reparaturen unter Einhaltung vertraglicher Termine und unter Berücksichtigung lokaler gesetzlicher Vorgaben Verantwortlich für die Qualität der vor Ort ausgeführten Arbeiten mittels Qualitätskontrolle und Beurteilung der Fähigkeiten von lokalen Hilfskräften Durchführen von Produkttraining vor Ort am Produkt und während der Installation Verantwortlich für die Evaluierung von Risiken und deren Minimierung. Koordination und Anweisung von Arbeitskräften Kostenkontrolle der eingesetzten Ressourcen und regelmäßiges Rapportieren an die Projektleitung Aktives Mitarbeiten an Prozessverbesserungen und proaktives Ergreifen von Maßnahmen zur Effizienzsteigerung der Tätigkeiten vor Ort Ihr Hintergrund Abgeschlossene Lehre in der Metallbau-, Elektro- oder Automobilbranche Elektrotechnische Grundkenntnisse sind ein Muss, elektrotechnische Weiterbildung von Vorteil Mindestens 5 Jahre Berufserfahrung im Montage- und Inbetriebsetzungsbereich Sehr gute Deutsch- und gute Englischkenntnisse, mindestens B2 Bereitschaft zu nationalen und vor allem internationalen weltweiten Einsätzen mit bis zu 80 % Reisetätigkeit Flexibler, belastbarer und kommunikativer Teamplayer Flair für pragmatische und unkonventionelle Lösungssuche mit hohen Qualitäts- und Sicherheitsstandards Mehr über uns Spannende und abwechslungsreiche Aufgaben mit viel Gestaltungsspielraum Attraktive Möglichkeiten zur Weiterbildung und persönlichen Entwicklung Interessante und vielfältige Tätigkeiten\/Projekte – auch mit Auslandseinsätzen Eingespieltes und dynamisches Team Offene Unternehmenskultur Attraktives Leistungspaket inklusive fixer Vergütung, Reise- und Verpflegungskosten sowie Mitspracherecht bei der Wahl der Unterkunft

descriptions.it: The opportunity Hitachi Energy, High Voltage Products, is renowned worldwide as a specialist for power transmission and distribution. The Service unit is responsible for the worldwide after sales support of generator circuit-breaker (GCB) systems and gas insulated switchgears (GIS), including training, installation and commissioning, scheduled maintenance, added value services, troubleshooting, extensions, retrofits and replacements. Service is the key to success. As a colleague in our globally active service team, you will appreciate the independent, varied and solution-oriented work. After a versatile, practice-oriented training in Switzerland and abroad, you will lead new GIS installations around the globe. A technically challenging position in a multicultural environment awaits you. You can expect an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow in it. Senior as well as junior applications are welcome! How you will make an impact Managing multicultural construction sites worldwide for gas insulated switchgear for the voltage level of 110KV - 550KV. Responsible for the successful execution of on-site installation \/ maintenance \/ repairs in compliance with contractual deadlines and in compliance with local legal requirements. Responsible for the quality of work performed on site through quality control and assessment of skills of local support staff. Conduct on-site product training on the product and during installation (optional). Coordination of local labor. Cost control of resources used and regular reporting to project management. Actively contribute to process improvements and proactively take measures to increase the efficiency of on-site activities. Your background Completed apprenticeship in the metal construction, electrical or automotive industry, or similar Basic knowledge in electrical engineering is a desirable must, further training in electrical engineering is an advantage Work experience in assembly & commissioning is an advantage Very good German and good English skills, at least B2 Willingness for national and especially international worldwide assignments with up to 90 % travel time Flexible, resilient and communicative team player Flair for pragmatic and unconventional solutions with high quality and safety standards More about us Exciting and varied tasks with great creative freedom Attractive training and development opportunities Interesting and very varied activities\/projects, including off-shore assignments Well-established and dynamic team Open corporate culture An attractive benefits package including fixed, travel and meal expenses, as well as a say in the choice of accommodation

descriptions.it: The opportunity At Hitachi Energy, our purpose is to advance a sustainable energy future for all. We bring power to homes, schools, hospitals, and industries — and we do so with people who are passionate, collaborative, and committed to making a real difference. As a SCADA\/RTU Commissioning Engineer, you will join our Grid Automation Systems team in Baden, Switzerland. In this role, you will oversee the commissioning of substation automation systems for medium‑complexity assignments, ensuring all activities are completed safely, efficiently, and in line with contract requirements, quality standards, and safety expectations. How you'll make an impact • Carry out testing and commissioning of substation automation systems at customer sites in Switzerland and abroad, while actively supporting the Service Management team • Execute commissioning activities safely, following all Hitachi Energy and customer safety standards; report hazards and near misses to support continuous improvement • Perform commissioning tasks according to defined process descriptions and checklists; coordinate closely with engineering and project management teams • Identify, track, and resolve open points, ensuring customer sign‑off before site demobilization • Report site progress and planning updates; ensure efficient use of commissioning tools and test equipment • Provide marked‑up drawings to engineering for preparing as‑built documentation and final submissions • Support planning and implementation of commissioning activities • Implement design changes and provide mark‑ups for as‑built project documentation • Coordinate site activities required to finalize customer acceptance certification Your background • Bachelor's degree in electrical engineering or equivalent • 4+ years of experience as a commissioning engineer for automation systems and related products • Strong knowledge of substation SCADA\/RTU systems, HMI principles, and Hitachi Energy products; understanding of protection philosophies • Basic knowledge of communication protocols such as IEC 61850, LON, IEC 101–104, DNP; ability to read schematic drawings and identify discrepancies; strong problem‑solving and conflict‑resolution skills • Familiarity with engineering toolchains typical for SAS\/SCADA (IET600, PCM600, MicroSCADA); willingness to learn across SCADA, RTU, networking, and cybersecurity topics • Strong communication and presentation skills • Proficiency in spoken and written English, German is preferred More about us At Hitachi Energy, we believe that diversity and collaboration are the foundation of great innovation. You will join a global team where different perspectives are valued, and where we work together to advance a sustainable energy future for all.

descriptions.it: The opportunity In your role as an On-site IT Service Specialist, you will be responsible for delivering Desk Side Support to IT users, specifically handling IT issues that require physical intervention. Your duties will extend to aiding incident resolution through collaboration with various support teams and groups within the IT department. You will play a critical role, serving as a representative of the IT organization, acting as the interface between the customer and other IT functions. How you'll make an impact Diagnoses and resolves IT-related issues effectively and efficiently Ensures that computers are delivered in a 'ready-to-use' condition for IT users Provides ad-hoc training to users on common IT issues and guides them through self-service tools Handles warranty cases in collaboration with the appropriate Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEM) vendors Identifies and report potential risks that could impact the quality of OSS services Offers support to end users and ensure the functionality of IT equipment and software in meeting rooms and other user collaboration areas as part of desk-side support Adheres to prescribed OSS governance, which involves participating in meetings and following the escalation process, among other responsibilities Follows OSS procedures as outlined in the Runbook, Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), and knowledge articles Your background Formal qualification in IT completed from an accredited university or college OR completed an apprenticeship in the field of IT ​ Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, including the ability to communicate effectively with both business and technical audiences in German and English. ​ Proactive and solution-oriented mindset ​ Demonstrates an ability to work independently and is self-driven ​ Legal authorization to work in applied location is required . We will not sponsor individuals for employment visas now or in the future for this role ​ More about us Hitachi Energy is committed to creating a diverse, inclusive, and collaborative work environment where people from different backgrounds come together to build innovative solutions for a more sustainable energy future.

descriptions.it: The opportunity Our High Voltage Products division is a worldwide specialist in power transmission and distribution. Our Service Unit supports customers around the globe with Generator Circuit Breaker systems (GCB) and gas‑insulated switchgear (GIS). From training and commissioning to maintenance, troubleshooting, upgrades, and replacements — we ensure critical power infrastructure works reliably, safely, and efficiently. Service is at the heart of everything we do. As part of our international service team, you'll take on varied, hands‑on work and become a recognized product expert. After comprehensive, practical training in Switzerland, you'll travel the world to commission and maintain GCB systems — all while working in a dynamic, multicultural environment. This is a role with real impact, technical depth, and plenty of room to grow. How you´ll make an impact Lead multicultural service projects for GCB on power plants from 20 MW to 1600 MW worldwide Ensure smooth and timely execution of installation and maintenance work on site Perform the final quality check and guarantee that all work meets our high standards Deliver product training directly to customers at their facilities Identify risks proactively and implement effective mitigation measures Coordinate on‑site teams and give practical, clear instructions Manage resource and provide regular reporting to project management Drive process improvements and implement efficiency‑boosting initiatives on site Your background Completed apprenticeship in metalwork, electrical engineering, or automotive technology Solid electrical knowledge (essential); further education such as a technician diploma is a plus Minimum 2 years of professional experience; experience in site leadership is an advantage Good English skills (B2 or above); German is a plus High willingness to travel — up to 80% worldwide Flexible, resilient, and communicative team player who enjoys solving problems pragmatically and values high safety and quality standards More about us Exciting and varied tasks with great creative freedom Attractive training and development opportunities Interesting and very varied activities\/projects, including off-shore assignments Well-established and dynamic team Open corporate culture An attractive benefits package including fixed, travel and meal expenses, as well as a say in the choice of accommodation

How you´ll make an impact Lead multicultural service projects for GCB on power plants from 20 MW to 1600 MW worldwide Ensure smooth and timely execution of installation and maintenance work on site Perform the final quality check and guarantee that all work meets our high standards Deliver product training directly to customers at their facilities Identify risks proactively and implement effective mitigation measures Coordinate on‑site teams and give practical, clear instructions Manage resource and provide regular reporting to project management Drive process improvements and implement efficiency‑boosting initiatives on site Your background Completed apprenticeship in metalwork, electrical engineering, or automotive technology Solid electrical knowledge (essential); further education such as a technician diploma is a plus Minimum 2 years of professional experience; experience in site leadership is an advantage Good English skills (B2 or above); German is a plus High willingness to travel — up to 80% worldwide Flexible, resilient, and communicative team player who enjoys solving problems pragmatically and values high safety and quality standards More about us Exciting and varied tasks with great creative freedom Attractive training and development opportunities Interesting and very varied activities\/projects, including off-shore assignments Well-established and dynamic team Open corporate culture An attractive benefits package including fixed, travel and meal expenses, as well as a say in the choice of accommodation

descriptions.it: The opportunity Join our Next Generation Grids Transformers team in Geneva and shape the future of energy. As a Senior R&D Electrical Engineer, you will work on cutting-edge transformer technologies in a dynamic, international environment. You'll be part of a collaborative team, contributing to the full R&D lifecycle—from concept to testing and product launch, ensuring that our solutions meet both technical specifications and market demands. This role offers hands-on experience, technical growth, and the chance to make a real impact in the energy transition. How you will make an impact Apply your knowledge of electromagnetism to support innovative concepts' validation through simulations Tackle a variety of engineering challenges on Medium Frequency Transformers Contribute to the development of new features in our internal design tools Organize prototyping and testing activities to validate new technologies\/products in collaboration with global teams Align your work with our strategic technology roadmap Take ownership of work packages and deliver results using a structured approach Deepen your understanding of transformer technologies and support internal consulting to optimize your R&D activities Contribute to intellectual property and risk management activities in R&D Your background MSc or PhD in Electrical or Electromechanical Engineering, ideally with experience in R&D within a business environment Knowledge of electromagnetism and circuit theory with ability to perform electromagnetic simulations Proficiency in MATLAB and\/or Python Strong communication skills in English (French is a plus) Analytical thinking and ability to work independently and collaboratively within interdisciplinary and international teams Awareness of business processes related to product development More about us We offer flexible working practices and a supportive environment where you can grow your skills and career. What you can expect from us Exciting career and training opportunities within Hitachi Energy Inclusive and diverse work culture Discounts on fitness memberships and various services Attractive pension benefits through our company pension fund

titles.fr: Ingénieur de conception électrique - Transformateurs à sec 80 – 100% (f/m/d)

descriptions.it: Descrizione Unisciti al nostro team di ingegneria Dry Transformer, ti aiuterà a modellare i progetti di nuova generazione che migliorano la sicurezza, l'efficienza e la sostenibilità nelle applicazioni di potenza critica. Collaborerai a stretto contatto con R&D, produzione, qualità e supply chain per tradurre i requisiti dei clienti in soluzioni manifatturiere e vederli attraverso prototipi, test di tipo e rilascio seriale. Lavorando in progetti e standard globali, approfondirete le vostre competenze nei sistemi di isolamento, nella progettazione elettromagnetica e nelle prestazioni termiche, contribuendo alla digitalizzazione dei nostri processi di progettazione. Questo è un ruolo di alto impatto in cui il vostro lavoro consente direttamente elettricità affidabile per industrie e comunità in tutto il mondo. Mansioni - Condurre lo sviluppo di specifiche e modelli di progettazione, assicurando che soddisfino tutti gli standard e le normative pertinenti - Condurre approfondite recensioni e verifiche di progettazione, implementando modifiche per elevare la qualità del progetto - Monitorare e gestire le linee temporali del progetto, garantire la realizzazione di pietre miliari di progettazione e i progetti vengono consegnati in orario - Condurre valutazioni dei rischi, sviluppare strategie di mitigazione e cercare opportunità di innovazione progettuale - Impegnarsi con i clienti per catturare e incorporare il loro feedback in soluzioni di design, migliorando la soddisfazione del cliente - Collabora con il team della supply chain per garantire che i progetti siano manufacturable e convenienti, selezionando materiali e componenti ottimali - Preparare e mantenere una documentazione dettagliata che supporta i processi di progettazione e facilita la condivisione delle conoscenze - Identificare e implementare continui miglioramenti di progettazione basati sui risultati dei test e sulle migliori pratiche del settore, migliorando qualità ed efficienza Requisiti - Laurea in ingegneria elettrica o in un campo correlato - 2-5 anni di esperienza nella progettazione elettrica di trasformatori di tipo secco - Eccellente analitica e capacità di problem solving - Capacità di lavorare in modo indipendente e come parte di un team multidisciplinare - L'inglese è un must, l'italiano è benefico - atteggiamento proattivo, automotivato e con un forte senso di proprietà - Aperto a cambiamento, feedback e miglioramento continuo Cosa? - Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere
descriptions.en: ## Descrizione The opportunity Joining our Dry Transformer engineering team, you'll help shape next generation designs that improve safety, efficiency, and sustainability in critical power applications. You'll collaborate closely with R&D, production, quality, and supply chain to translate customer requirements into manufacturable solutions and see them through prototype, type testing, and serial release. Working across global projects and standards, you'll deepen your expertise in insulation systems, electromagnetic design, and thermal performance while contributing to the digitalization of our design processes. This is a high impact role where your work directly enables reliable electricity for industries and communities worldwide. ## Mansioni - Lead the development of design specifications and models, ensuring they meet all relevant standards and regulations - Conduct thorough design reviews and verifications, implementing modifications to elevate project quality - Monitor and manage project timelines, ensuring design milestones are achieved and projects are delivered on schedule - Conduct risk assessments, develop mitigation strategies, and seek opportunities for design innovations - Engage with customers to capture and incorporate their feedback into design solutions, enhancing customer satisfaction - Collaborate with the supply chain team to ensure designs are manufacturable and cost-effective, selecting optimal materials and components - Prepare and maintain detailed documentation that supports design processes and facilitates knowledge sharing - Identify and implement continuous design improvements based on test results and industry best practices, enhancing quality and efficiency ## Requisiti - Degree in electrical engineering or a related field - 2-5 years of experience in electrical design engineering of dry type transformers - Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills - Ability to work both independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team - English is a must, Italian is beneficial - Pro-active attitude, self-motivated and with a strong sense of ownership - Open to change, feedback and continuous improvement ## Cosa offriamo - Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow
descriptions.de: Beschreibung Mit unserem Dry Transformer Engineering Team können Sie Designs der nächsten Generation gestalten, die Sicherheit, Effizienz und Nachhaltigkeit in kritischen Leistungsanwendungen verbessern. Sie arbeiten eng mit F&D, Produktion, Qualität und Lieferkette zusammen, um die Kundenanforderungen in manufakturierbare Lösungen zu übersetzen und durch Prototypen, Mustertests und Serienfreigabe zu sehen. In der Zusammenarbeit mit globalen Projekten und Standards vertiefen Sie Ihr Know-how in Isolationssystemen, elektromagnetischem Design und thermischer Leistung und tragen zur Digitalisierung unserer Designprozesse bei. Dies ist eine wichtige Rolle, in der Ihre Arbeit direkt zuverlässigen Strom für Industrien und Gemeinden weltweit ermöglicht. Mansion - Führen Sie die Entwicklung von Design-Spezifikationen und -Modellen, um sicherzustellen, dass sie alle relevanten Standards und Vorschriften erfüllen - Durchführung gründlicher Design-Bewertungen und -Verifikationen, Umsetzung von Änderungen zur Erhöhung der Projektqualität - Überwachen und verwalten Sie die Projektzeitpläne, um sicherzustellen, dass Design-Meilen erreicht werden und Projekte termingerecht ausgeliefert werden - Risikobewertungen durchführen, Strategien zur Minderung entwickeln und Chancen für Designinnovationen suchen - Nehmen Sie mit Kunden ein, um ihr Feedback in Designlösungen zu erfassen und zu integrieren, die Kundenzufriedenheit zu verbessern - Mit dem Supply Chain Team zusammenarbeiten, um sicherzustellen, dass Designs herstellbar und kostengünstig sind, optimale Materialien und Komponenten auswählen - Bereiten und pflegen detaillierte Dokumentationen, die Designprozesse unterstützen und den Wissensaustausch erleichtern - Erkennen und implementieren Sie kontinuierliche Designverbesserungen basierend auf Testergebnissen und branchenspezifischen Best Practices, Verbesserung der Qualität und Effizienz Voraussetzungen - Grad in der Elektrotechnik oder einem verwandten Bereich - 2-5 Jahre Erfahrung in der Elektrotechnik von Trockentransformatoren - Ausgezeichnete analytische und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, sowohl unabhängig als auch als Teil eines multidisziplinären Teams zu arbeiten - Englisch ist ein Muss, Italienisch ist nützlich - Pro-aktive Haltung, selbst motiviert und mit einem starken Gefühl des Eigentums - Offen für Veränderungen, Feedback und kontinuierliche Verbesserung Cosa offriamo - Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistung zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können
descriptions.fr: Descrizione L'occasion De vous joindre à notre équipe d'ingénierie de Transformateur Dry, vous aiderez à façonner des conceptions de prochaine génération qui améliorent la sécurité, l'efficacité et la durabilité dans les applications énergétiques critiques. Vous collaborerez étroitement avec la R-D, la production, la qualité et la chaîne d'approvisionnement afin de traduire les exigences des clients en solutions de fabrication et de les voir par prototype, essai de type et libération en série. En travaillant sur des projets et des normes mondiaux, vous approfondirez votre expertise en systèmes d'isolation, conception électromagnétique et performance thermique tout en contribuant à la numérisation de nos processus de conception. Il s'agit d'un rôle à fort impact où votre travail permet directement une électricité fiable pour les industries et les collectivités du monde entier. Mansioni - Diriger l'élaboration de spécifications et de modèles de conception, en s'assurant qu'ils répondent à toutes les normes et réglementations pertinentes - Procéder à des examens et vérifications approfondis de la conception, en apportant des modifications pour améliorer la qualité des projets - Surveiller et gérer le calendrier des projets, s'assurer que les étapes de la conception sont atteintes et que les projets sont exécutés dans les délais prévus - Effectuer des évaluations des risques, élaborer des stratégies d'atténuation et rechercher des possibilités d'innovation en matière de conception - S'engager auprès des clients pour capturer et intégrer leurs commentaires dans les solutions de conception, en améliorant la satisfaction des clients - Collaborer avec l'équipe de la chaîne d'approvisionnement pour s'assurer que les designs sont fabriqués et rentables, en choisissant des matériaux et composants optimaux - Préparer et tenir à jour une documentation détaillée qui appuie les processus de conception et facilite le partage des connaissances - Identifier et mettre en oeuvre des améliorations continues de conception basées sur les résultats des essais et les meilleures pratiques de l'industrie, en améliorant la qualité et l'efficacité Requisiti - Diplôme en génie électrique ou domaine connexe - 2-5 ans d'expérience en conception électrique de transformateurs de type sec - Excellentes compétences en analyse et résolution de problèmes - Capacité de travailler indépendamment et dans le cadre d'une équipe multidisciplinaire - L'anglais est un must, l'italien est bénéfique - attitude pro-active, automotivée et avec un fort sentiment de propriété - Ouvert au changement, retour d'information et amélioration continue Cosa offriamo - Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir
